# Random seed: 12345
C  = 00|'R'10|'S'100|'T'11100|'R'111111000|'T'11111111111
J  = 00    11    111    11000    111001111    10111111001
K  = 01    10    111    11111    000000011    10001111000
Q  = 00    00    111    00000    000000000    11111111111
!Q = 11    11    000    11111    111111111    00000000000
